name: ye4wzp--short-drama-publisher
description: Automated short drama video publisher. Downloads drama content from MoboBoost, uses AI to identify highlight moments, clips 15-second vertical videos with text overlays, and auto-publishes to Facebook. Strawberry TV workflow clone. Triggers: "短剧发布", "short drama", "MoboBoost", "video publisher", "自动发布", "剪辑短剧".
